🤖 AgentRecall Doc
Docs Quick Start API Reference Security Get Started

Quick Start

Get started with AgentRecall in minutes.

1. Register an Account

2. Create an API Key

After logging in, create an API key from the dashboard.

3. Test the MCP Interface

curl -X POST https://agentrecall.io/mcp \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -d '{
    "jsonrpc": "2.0",
    "id": 1,
    "method": "tools/call",
    "params": {
      "name": "verify_health",
      "arguments": {}
    }
  }'

4. Query Pitfall Knowledge

curl -X POST https://agentrecall.io/mcp \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -d '{
    "jsonrpc": "2.0",
    "id": 2,
    "method": "tools/call",
    "params": {
      "name": "query_pitfall",
      "arguments": {
        "query": "docker error"
      }
    }
  }'

5. Submit Pitfall Knowledge

curl -X POST https://agentrecall.io/mcp \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -d '{
    "jsonrpc": "2.0",
    "id": 3,
    "method": "tools/call",
    "params": {
      "name": "submit_pitfall",
      "arguments": {
        "pattern": "Your error pattern description",
        "workaround": "Your solution"
      }
    }
  }'

Next Steps
